query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users) as total_usuarios,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clients) as total_clientes,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM projects) as total_proyectos,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM quotations) as total_cotizaciones,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tasks) as total_tareas,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM appointments) as total_citas;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bxEETtHLyojAa4.root --database XhEkCr8yXcaeDFyuQebdJQ --execute SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users) as total_usuarios,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clients) as total_clientes,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM projects) as total_proyectos,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM quotations) as total_cotizaciones,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tasks) as total_tareas,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM appointments) as total_citas;
